package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationDeferForSimpleUnlockInHotLoop() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_defer_for_simple_unlock_in_hot_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag defer used for simple unlock/close work inside very hot loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
